no_changes_rationale:
All four AC items for ddx-e658e2ae are already satisfied by commit b9b7932d
("fix(beadform): use design tokens; replace inline CSS-var status with badge class [ddx-e658e2ae]")
on the current base. Verified in cli/internal/server/frontend/src/lib/components/BeadForm.svelte:

  1. inputClass (line 130) uses `text-body-sm` — not `text-sm`.
  2. labelClass (line 131-132) uses `font-label-caps text-label-caps` — not `text-xs`.
  3. Status <select> (lines 174-178) uses `class="{inputClass} {statusBadgeClass(status)}"`,
     where statusBadgeClass returns Tailwind utility classes (`badge-status-open`,
     `badge-status-in-progress`, `badge-status-blocked`, `badge-status-closed`,
     `badge-status-neutral`). No inline `style="background-color: var(--status-…)"`
     remains.
  4. Cancel button (line 269) and Submit button (line 276) both use `text-body-sm`
     — not `text-sm`.

The previous review's BLOCK ("Diff only contains a result.json execution artifact;
no changes to BeadForm.svelte are visible") appears to have inspected only the
execute-bead bundle delta rather than the merged base state. The change landed
in b9b7932d and has not regressed.

No further code changes are warranted. Recommend closing.
